titleStmt.title: SII 28.235: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 235. (A.R. No. 390 of 1913.)

summary.p: Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, west wall.

p.hi: Kulōttuṅga II Year 12, Vṛiśchika śu. 12, Wednesday, Rēvati = 1144 A.D. November 8, f. d. t. ·16.

summary.p: This record starts abruptly with the meykkīrtti, pu mēvu vaḷar of the king, without prefacing it with a svasti śri. It states that one Tōraṇavallaba-pērayaṉ, resident of Uṟumūr alias Vikkiramachōḻa-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Mēṟkā-nāḍu in Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, who had connections with Kāḍavarāyan gifted 4 mā of land in two plots, one of which was purchased from a brahmin of the village and the other from the sabhā, for the ritualistic food offerings (tiru-mandira-pōṉagam) during the early morning service to God Mahādēva of Chiṟuttirukkōyil in this ūr.
It is to be noted that the name of the donor is given differently in each of the two places where his name is mentioned.
A small end-portion of the record is not available.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmevu vaḷar tiruppoṉ mārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa māmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyuñ celvamu meṇṭicai viḷaṅka niruparvanniṟaiñca niṇila maṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar tiruma
ṇi muṭikavitteṉa Aṇimuṭi cūṭi mallai ñālattu palluyiṟkkellām Ellaiyiliṉpam Iyalviṉilyeyta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟ ceṅkolocci vāḻiyūḻi vāḻi naṭappa cempoṉ virasiṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakeca
ripaṟmarāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu viruccika nāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu tuvādaciyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum Irevatiyum peṟṟa nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāja payaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu brammadeyam Uṟumurāṉa vikkirama co
ḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Irukkum kāṭavarāyaṉ A yāṉkuṭiyāṉāṉa toraṇavallavaperayaṉeṉ Ivvūr Uṭaiyār ciṟuttirukkoyil Uṭaiya mahādevarkku nāṉ ciṟukālaiccantiyil tirumantirapoṉakam caṉtirātittavaṟ celvatāka Ivvūr cantiracekaravati
kku kiḻakku ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻavāykkālukku teṟku 2 100 3 10 1 catirattu nāṉ Āritaṉ Ātittaṉ tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Ennutāyirunta nila Oru mā mukkāṇiyum Itan meṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nān Ivvū
r mahāsapaiyār paṭuvilai koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Ennutāyirunta nilam Iraṇṭumākkāṇiyum Āka nilam nālumā Innilam nālumāvukkum kiḻpāṟkellai Āritan celvan kaṇṇan Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkun tenpāṟkellai kaṭampāṟṟu nirnilaikku vaṭa
kkum meṟkellai sapaippotuvukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭakkellai Āritan Ātittan tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyān Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku teṟku
Ivvicaiinta nāṉkellaikkum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam nālumāvum Innilam nālumāvum Uṭaiyār ciṟutirukkoyil mahātevaṟku tirumantirappo
ṉakattukku Uṭalākac cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka śrīpātattey nirvārttukkuṭutten Ivvūrirukkum kāṭavarāyaṉ Aṭiyān kuṭitāṅkiyāna
toraṇa cūrappallavaraiyaṉen Itu śrīmāyecaravar Irakṣai Ivar veṇṭikkoḷḷa Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉen cāttamaṅkalattirukkum ve
ḷḷāḷan tirunallūruṭaiyān veḷān Attiyūrāḷiyāṉa puliyūrnāṭṭu veḷāṉena Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ivai toraṇa vallavaperaya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ teṅkaḷūruṭaiyāṉ mācilāmaṇi tirukkarakkoyiluṭaiyāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ā
ritaṉ tiruvikkiramaṉ tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉeṉ Stops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
